summary: Plan-only assessment for one open maintainer-ready PR. #88709 is not mergeable from the provided preflight because the diff is large auth-provider work, PR comments/review-bot comments were not hydrated, checks could not be fetched due a GitHub API rate-limit error, mergeability is unknown, and no Codex /review merge preflight is present. A repair or merge recommendation needs fresh complete preflight rather than an executable fix artifact from this shard.
